mdtools.failure_summary: The mdtools retest still failed with block ordering mismatches and incorrect subsection placement under the destination parent under both scorers.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the 30-turn cap with repeated invalid responses. Its final scored output misplaced the moved subsection before `### Shift Closeout Checklist` instead of after it, and the final trace also left the checklist lines under `### Pager Rotation Exceptions`.

gap.rejection_reason: Hybrid passed and unix failed with an AST-structural label, but the mdtools seed failed, so the family cannot satisfy the T10 promotion gate requiring at least one mdtools win.

notes: This candidate reproduced the hybrid-only rescue shape: hybrid completed the structural relocation in 127.12s with no invalid responses, while mdtools-only and unix both failed.
The family remains rejected after a 2026-05-02 mdtools retest because mdtools mode still failed, so it cannot satisfy the T10 promotion gate requiring at least one mdtools win.
